title: T-070 — Seed: manufacturing_operations + alert_thresholds + iso4217 baseline
prompt:
# T-070 — Seed: manufacturing_operations + alert_thresholds + iso4217 baseline

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §6.1, §10.6, §8.5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Idempotent seed for manufacturing_operations + alert_thresholds reference rows.

Org-scoped seeds run per org tenant. Uses 02-SETTINGS reference_tables. ATP threshold default 10 RLU, catch-weight variance 5%, plus an example list of 8 manufacturing operations.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- db/seeds/03-technical-baseline.sql [create]
- tests/db/seed-baseline.test.ts [create]

## Out of scope
- Org-specific custom rows

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given seed runs against a fresh org, when applied, then 8 manufacturing_operations rows exist for that org.
2. Given seed runs twice, when applied second time, then no duplicate rows.
3. Given alert_thresholds row 'atp_swab_rlu_max' missing, when seed runs, then it is created with value=10.

## Test strategy
- RED test for idempotency + presence.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/db/seed-baseline.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not seed across orgs blindly — must accept org_id parameter.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
